title: sterculia apetala var. elata
intro: Sterculia apetala var. elata, also known as the 'tall sterculia', is a plant species that belongs to the family Malvaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, diarrhea, and various respiratory issues. The health benefits of Sterculia apetala var. elata include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as tea, infusion, or decoction, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
